actions.description:
### Get vaccinated at your GP surgery

Contact your GP surgery to book an appointment.

### Book an appointment online at a pharmacy

You can book an appointment online at a pharmacy that offers the COVID-19 vaccination. You need to be registered with a GP to do this.

### Get vaccinated without an appointment

You can get an COVID-19 vaccination at some pharmacies without needing an appointment.

You do not need to be registered with a GP to do this.
actions.urlLabel: Find a pharmacy where you can get a free COVID-19 vaccination

actions.description:
### If you think this is incorrect

If you have already had this vaccination or your personal details are wrong, visit our [help and support page](https://www.nhs.uk/nhs-app/nhs-app-help-and-support/).

eligibilityCohorts.cohortText: are aged 75 or over (including those who will be 75 by 31 January 2026)

processedSuggestions.statusText: You should have the COVID-19 vaccine
